'''''SHADIS Magazine'' 28''' was a roleplaying magazine from September/October of [[1996]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including an adventure for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The adventure was called "[[Slaver's Chains]]" and was written by [[James Macduff]].
